title: Space and stars GUI Compat
description: Mod compatibility for my "Space and stars GUI" texture pack
body:
SPACE AND STARS GUI MOD COMPATIBILITY

I made my texture pack compatible with some of the requested mods. Now your mods will be galactic as well!

Right now it works with:

- AppleSkin
- Just Enough Items
- Colorful Hearts
- Sophisticated Backpacks

It doesn't require Optifine to work.

Suggestions are welcome! (In terms of mods to add and changes in looks).

Right now i make this for version 1.20.1, it might work for previous versions if the mods haven't changed any textures. 

Link to original texture pack:
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/space-and-stars-gui

Enjoy!

PS: Remember i only upload on curseforge and modrinth. If you see this pack anywhere else then it wasn't me uploading, so look out for viruses!
